## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Verification

- [ ] `./scripts/check.sh`
- [ ] `./script/build_and_run.sh`
- [ ] `./scripts/package_app.sh` if packaging, versioning, or install docs changed

## Product Surface

- [ ] permissions or environment variable changes documented
- [ ] README updated for public-facing behavior changes
- [ ] release docs updated when packaging or installation behavior changed
